description:
The <k-grid> component is a CSS grid wrapper. It goes very well together
with the <k-column> component, which allows to set column widths
in a very comfortable way. Any other element within the Grid component
can be used as well though.

Customised the grid via the `--columns` CSS property on `<k-grid>`
and the `--width` and/or `--span` properties on its children.

props.name: variant
props.description: Variants for common grid-spacing use cases

slots.name: default
slots.description: All items that will be arranged in the grid
